hero.tagline: Building modern web applications with a focus on code quality, performance, and user experience.
about.heading: Background & Experience
about.description: Developing modern web applications by combining software engineering, design, and artificial intelligence.
about.philosophy_p1: I believe that a quality frontend is a combination of thoughtful user experience, clean architecture, and modern technologies. I constantly explore new tools, including AI, and apply them to improve the quality and speed of development.
about.description_main: I am a Frontend Developer specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I love creating intuitive, fast, and responsive interfaces that not only look good but also solve real user problems.
skills.heading: Technical Arsenal
skills.description: A comprehensive list of the tools, frameworks, and technologies I use to build scalable web applications and AI solutions.
projects.heading: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of my recent work, focusing on AI integrations, robust backend architecture, and premium frontend experiences.
contact.heading: Let's build something amazing together.
contact.description: Currently available for freelance work and open to new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
exp.iqadam.description: Participated in the development of web applications as part of a team, implementing user interfaces and integrating with the backend.
exp.iqadam.hl1: Coded responsive pages from Figma designs.
exp.iqadam.hl2: Implemented functionality using JavaScript and React.
exp.iqadam.hl3: Integrated the interface with REST APIs.
exp.iqadam.hl4: Optimized performance, fixed bugs, and improved user experience.
exp.iqadam.hl5: Worked with Git and participated in team development.
exp.spacelab.description: Participated in designing user interfaces and preparing designs for development.
exp.spacelab.hl2: Created layouts and interactive interface prototypes.
exp.spacelab.hl3: Prepared design mockups for handover to developers.
exp.spacelab.hl4: Gained practical experience in collaborative work on digital products.
project.code-ai.title: CodeAi
project.code-ai.description: A comprehensive graduation project combining programming courses, interactive problem-solving, an in-browser IDE, and an AI chat assistant.
project.ai-miky.title: AI Miky
project.ai-miky.description: An AI assistant application built with Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini API for facilitating simple, intelligent conversations.
